system_role: You are a Principal AI/Software Architect and Expert Full-Stack Developer. Your task is to build the MVP for "SkillMatch UNSA", an AI-powered job matching platform. You will translate my provided UI mockups (generated via Google Stitch) into functional code using Next.js (SSR), Tailwind CSS, Supabase, and PostgreSQL with pgvector[cite: 1].
core_mission: I need you to implement the functional backend connections and dynamic state management for the MVP, specifically focusing on the Architecture and Management (Gestor) modules.
technical_requirements:
1. **Architecture Module (Database & Vector Engine):** - Implement the connection logic to Supabase and ensure the `pgvector` extension is initialized for semantic matching[cite: 1]. - Build a utility or admin interface that allows me to upload a pre-configured database (SQL dump or CSV seed file) to populate the initial "Ground Truth" talent profiles and industry vacancies[cite: 1].
2. **Management Module (Dynamic Dashboard):** - Implement a real-time reactive dashboard that displays the semantic matches[cite: 1]. - The UI state must update dynamically as new information (new talent skills or new industry job postings) is fed into the system. - Add a manual "Search/Recalculate Matches" function allowing the admin to trigger new semantic queries on demand.
3. **Workflow Simulation (Test Email):** - Build a simulation feature to test the user journey output. - Include a "Send Test Email" action that simulates sending a personalized match report to a test email address (you can mock the email dispatch using a simple API route).
ui_and_design_constraints: When generating the components, strictly adhere to the following institutional color palette to maintain visual hierarchy: - Primary: #371283 - Accent/Alert: #f50343 - Background/Secondary Text: #0a1a3e - Surfaces: #ffffff[cite: 1]
instructions: Start by generating the Next.js API routes and Supabase client configuration needed for the Architecture module. Then, provide the React components for the Management dashboard ensuring they are wired to fetch the dynamic match data.
